requirement_topic.en: China GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023 Baseline vs Philippines Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023基线与菲律宾接受差距
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023基線與菲律賓接受差距

summary.en: Philippines reviewers may use China GB reports as supporting technical evidence only if the importer, BPS route, ERC / grid reviewer, fire authority, project owner, insurer, or contract accepts them. China domestic compliance should not be treated as automatic Philippines compliance for standards, grid connection, ancillary services, fire safety, transport, or customs.
summary.zh: 只有在进口商、BPS路径、ERC/电网审查方、消防主管机关、项目业主、保险方或合同接受时，菲律宾审查方才可能将中国GB报告作为支持性技术证据。中国国内合规不应被视为自动满足菲律宾标准、并网、辅助服务、消防安全、运输或海关要求。
summary.zht: 只有在進口商、BPS路徑、ERC/電網審查方、消防主管機關、項目業主、保險方或合約接受時，菲律賓審查方才可能將中國GB報告作為支持性技術證據。中國國內合規不應被視為自動滿足菲律賓標準、併網、輔助服務、消防安全、運輸或海關要求。

standards_or_laws: Philippines BPS / PNS, ERC, grid, fire, transport, customs, and project requirements applicable to the shipment or site
IEC or PNS documents where required by the Philippines approval route

summary.en: The GB-standard cn_common_equivalent baseline for China BESS commonly includes GB 44240-2024 for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage, GB/T 36276-2023 for electric-energy-storage lithium-ion batteries, and GB/T 36558-2023 for electrochemical energy storage system technical requirements.
summary.zh: 中国BESS常见GB-standard cn_common_equivalent基线包括电力储能用锂离子电芯和电池GB 44240-2024、电力储能用锂离子电池GB/T 36276-2023，以及电化学储能系统技术要求GB/T 36558-2023。
summary.zht: 中國BESS常見GB-standard cn_common_equivalent基線包括電力儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池GB 44240-2024、電力儲能用鋰離子電池GB/T 36276-2023，以及電化學儲能系統技術要求GB/T 36558-2023。

gap.en: The gap is recognition and scope. Create a traceable matrix showing which China GB clauses cover the requested Philippines, PNS, IEC, grid, fire, transport, or project clauses, and clearly mark any evidence that is only China domestic, IEC-aligned, project-owner accepted, or locally approved.
gap.zh: 差距在于认可和范围。应建立可追溯矩阵，说明中国GB条款覆盖哪些菲律宾、PNS、IEC、电网、消防、运输或项目条款，并清楚标注哪些证据仅属于中国国内、IEC对齐、项目业主接受或当地批准。
gap.zht: 差距在於認可和範圍。應建立可追溯矩陣，說明中國GB條款覆蓋哪些菲律賓、PNS、IEC、電網、消防、運輸或項目條款，並清楚標註哪些證據僅屬於中國國內、IEC對齊、項目業主接受或當地批准。

mandatory_status.target: Philippines acceptance is mandatory only where a Philippines authority, importer, grid operator, fire authority, customs route, insurer, or contract requires the mapped evidence; China GB reports alone are not confirmed as a mandatory or sufficient Philippines approval route
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for covered China domestic electric-energy-storage lithium-ion cells and batteries; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are commonly used recommended technical references

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation Standard Public Service Platform

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558-2023 as China baseline evidence, not as automatic Philippines compliance. Acceptance must be confirmed by the specific BPS, ERC, grid, fire, transport, customs, or contract path.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023作为中国基线证据，而非自动菲律宾合规证明。接受性必须由具体BPS、ERC、电网、消防、运输、海关或合同路径确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023作為中國基線證據，而非自動菲律賓合規證明。接受性必須由具體BPS、ERC、電網、消防、運輸、海關或合約路徑確認。
